query_result.output_text: I have a comprehensive understanding of the filing's treatment. Let me verify a few specific details about the disclosures to ensure accuracy.
query_result.reasoning: The retrieval gave me a comprehensive answer. Let me also verify some specific details by retrieving more information about the specific accounting treatment and what's no longer observable. Let me also check the specific language in the filing about the change in reporting entity and what's not provided.

tool_calls.name: retrieve_information
tool_calls.args: {"prompt":"What specific language does the filing use regarding: (1) the change in reporting entity designation, (2) the statement that separate financial statements of xAI and X are not provided, (3) the elimination of intercompany transactions, and (4) the absence of goodwill and intangible assets? Quote the exact language from the filing. {{spacex_s1}}"}

tool_call.name: retrieve_information
tool_call.args: {"prompt":"What specific language does the filing use regarding: (1) the change in reporting entity designation, (2) the statement that separate financial statements of xAI and X are not provided, (3) the elimination of intercompany transactions, and (4) the absence of goodwill and intangible assets? Quote the exact language from the filing. {{spacex_s1}}"}

parsed_args.prompt: What specific language does the filing use regarding: (1) the change in reporting entity designation, (2) the statement that separate financial statements of xAI and X are not provided, (3) the elimination of intercompany transactions, and (4) the absence of goodwill and intangible assets? Quote the exact language from the filing. {{spacex_s1}}

tool_output.output:
# Exact Language from the Filing

## (1) Change in Reporting Entity Designation

> **"This presentation constitutes a change in reporting entity."**

This sentence appears twice in the filing — once referencing Note 13 and once referencing Note 12 — depending on the version of the preamble section.

## (2) Separate Financial Statements of xAI and X Not Provided

> **"As the consolidated financial statements already reflect the reorganization of entities under common control for all periods presented, separate financial statements of xAI and X are not provided."**

## (3) Elimination of Intercompany Transactions

The filing addresses this in two distinct locations:

- In the merger accounting discussion: **"all historical related party transactions between the entities have been eliminated in consolidation"**

- In Note 2 (Summary of Significant Accounting Policies): **"All intercompany balances and transactions have been eliminated in consolidation."**

## (4) Absence of Goodwill and Intangible Assets

> **"No new goodwill or other intangible assets have been recorded"**

This phrase appears in conjunction with the elimination of intercompany transactions, forming a single sentence: *"No new goodwill or other intangible assets have been recorded and all historical related party transactions between the entities have been eliminated in consolidation."*
